headline: Motorola Solutions Deepens Public Safety Stack With Exacom Deal And New Director
summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) has acquired Exacom, expanding its public safety communications recording and cloud native capabilities. The deal brings in SecuLore, Exacom's cybersecurity subsidiary focused on public safety networks. Motorola Solutions has also added software and cybersecurity executive Peter Leav to its board of directors. For you as an investor, these moves relate directly to Motorola Solutions' core focus on mission critical communications and supporting software for...
